scenarios.setup: Fresh Python repo at /tmp/understand-test-first-run-python/ with pyproject.toml, src/, tests/, README.md, .git/. No .planning/ directory exists.
expectations: Ensures .planning/ exists and adds it to .gitignore
Runs `claudia config init` and asks the user for pair vs yolo via AskUserQuestion
Dispatches researcher (and optionally code-explorer) to survey the repo
Drafts .planning/CONTEXT.md with all 4 sections; Environment section refreshed via `claudia env capture --section`
Summarises and suggests `/claudia rules` then `/claudia plan`

scenarios.setup: Repo at /tmp/understand-test-no-op-detection/ already has .planning/CONTEXT.md and .planning/config.json. No `refresh` arg, no drift hint.
expectations: Detects existing state and chooses No-op path
Does NOT rewrite CONTEXT.md or config.json

scenarios.setup: Repo at /tmp/understand-test-refresh-flow/ has .planning/CONTEXT.md and .planning/config.json. User invokes with `refresh` arg.
expectations: Detects refresh arg and chooses Refresh path
Re-dispatches researcher, diffs new narrative against existing CONTEXT.md
Presents AskUserQuestion gate (apply / edit / cancel) before writing narrative
Refreshes Environment section via `claudia env capture --section` regardless; leaves config.json alone
